title: Ability to customize order of  dropdown options on board and in Forms
excerpt: Client would like the ability to customize the order of Dropdown selections on the Form and Boards. Currently, the alphabetical order causes them to take time scrolling to the bottom of the form for a selection that is m…

posts.author: brookejarchow17 (Brooke)
posts.cookedHtml: Client would like the ability to customize the order of Dropdown selections on the Form and Boards. Currently, the alphabetical order causes them to take time scrolling to the bottom of the form for a selection that is most popular. They also asked for the ability to Pin a selection at the top if customizable dropdown order is not possible.
